headline: ROTATION CONFIRMATION. T3 staleness rotation. Live composite 83 (Exemplary band). Uruguay ranks Tier 1 globally for LGBTQ rights (Equaldex Equality Index, Libra 2024 LGBTQ+ Global Assessment); same-sex marriage legal since 2013; anti-discrimination protections since 2004; same-sex sexual activity legal with equal age of consent since 1934. Mixed signal: transgender life expectancy ~45 years; ~⅔ of transgender Uruguayans report physical violence — represents EQU calibration ceiling. Strong democratic institutions, social spending, Mercosur participation. No discrete in-window April 14-28 event. Confirmation appropriate. Confidence MEDIUM (raised from low) given quality of available rights-tier evidence.

evidence.finding: Tier 1 global LGBTQ rights ranking; same-sex marriage 2013; anti-discrimination since 2004; equal age of consent since 1934.
Comprehensive LGBTI rights infrastructure. Uruguay among most LGBTI-progressive nations globally.
Transgender life expectancy ~45 years; ~⅔ trans Uruguayans report physical violence — EQU ceiling constraint.
